body.purpose: All text. One family, weight contrast (400/500/600/700) creates hierarchy.

label.purpose: Form labels, secondary UI, nav links. 14px, semibold.

mono.displayName: SF Mono / Fira Code / JetBrains Mono
mono.purpose: Verifiable data only: addresses, hashes, proofs, transaction IDs.

shadows.name: modal-overlay
shadows.purpose: The only shadow in the system. Lifts the modal above the page plane.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (hover, focus, border, color).

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Standard transition duration. Fast enough for flow, slow enough to see.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile breakpoint. Navigation collapses to hamburger. Layout stacks.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary action button. Bronze background, dark text. Used for the most important action on any screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #b8976e; color: #10100e; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #b8976e; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c5a880; border-color: #c5a880; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b8976e; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Alternative action. Transparent with aged-steel border. Subordinate to primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #e5dfd6; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #3d3932; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #b8976e; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b8976e; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. No border, tighter padding. Inline controls and nav-adjacent interactions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #9a9288; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #e5dfd6; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b8976e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Teal Button
components.description: Data action button. Teal background for data-related actions (refresh, recalculate, export). Never for primary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-teal { background: #5a8a8a; color: #f5f0e8; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #5a8a8a; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-teal:hover { background: #7aa8a8; border-color: #7aa8a8; } .ds-btn-teal:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5a8a8a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-teal:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card (Dark)
components.description: Primary container for working surfaces. Dark carbon background, warm-iron border. Used for agent cards, vault panels, data groups.
components.html:
Agent Momentum Pulse v3

Strategy: Trend following, 4h timeframe
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1c1a17; border: 1px solid #2d2a25; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; transition: all 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(184, 151, 110, 0.25); }

components.name: Card (Light)
components.description: Light surface variant for reading contexts: onboarding, docs, marketing. Parchment background, warm-iron border.
components.html:
Welcome to Axiom

Your first agent is ready to mint.
components.css: .ds-card-light { background: #f0ebe3; border: 1px solid #2d2a25; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; transition: all 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card-light:hover { border-color: rgba(184, 151, 110, 0.25); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field. Obsidian background, aged-steel border. Focus shifts border to bronze.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #10100e; color: #f5f0e8; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #3d3932; font-size: 14px; font-family: inherit; min-width: 0; transition: all 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #b8976e; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #736b62; }

components.name: Alert (Error)
components.description: Error alert. Tinted red background, red border, red text. Role='alert' for screen readers.
components.css: .ds-alert-error { padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(200, 90, 90, 0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(200, 90, 90, 0.2); color: #c85a5a; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Alert (Info)
components.description: Informational alert. Teal wash background, teal border, teal text. Uses secondary accent for informational states.
components.html: Agent strategy updated. Changes take effect on next execution.
components.css: .ds-alert-info { padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(90, 138, 138, 0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(90, 138, 138, 0.2); color: #5a8a8a; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: MonoLabel
components.description: Inline label for verifiable data: addresses, hashes, transaction IDs. Bronze-tinted background, monospace font.
components.css: .ds-mono { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; color: #c5a880; background: rgba(184, 151, 110, 0.08); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; word-break: break-all; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top navigation bar. Obsidian background, blur backdrop, bronze active states.
components.html: Axiom ProtocolAgentsVaultMarket
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; padding: 14px 32px; background: #10100e; border-bottom: 1px solid #2d2a25; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-nav-brand { font-weight: 700; font-size: 20px; color: #f5f0e8; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #9a9288; text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 0; transition: color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #e5dfd6; } .ds-nav-active { color: #c5a880; }

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Inline loading indicator. 20px circle, warm-iron border with bronze top.
components.css: .ds-spinner { display: inline-block; width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 2px solid #2d2a25; border-top-color: #b8976e; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-spin 0.8s linear infinite; } @keyframes ds-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

narrative.overview:
Axiom Protocol's interface is a warm, secure interior: bronze hardware on dark wood, oxidized copper fittings, precious things behind glass. The design serves traders and agent creators who need dense, instrument-like control over their assets. The warmth comes from the material palette itself, not from decoration: tinted neutrals lean toward bronze, surfaces have subtle texture, and the teal secondary accent adds a cool counterpoint like patina on copper.

This system rejects three lanes: crypto-bro aesthetics (neon gradients, rocket emojis, meme-coin vibes), generic SaaS (cream backgrounds, rounded-32px cards, stock illustrations), and maximalist DeFi (TVL dashboards with 47 numbers, governance-speak). But it also rejects the default dark-mode DeFi template: pure-black backgrounds, cold grays, flat surfaces with no materiality. Axiom has texture. Axiom has warmth. Axiom has a second color.

The system adapts to context. The dashboard is dark and dense (the cockpit). Onboarding, docs, and marketing surfaces use a light parchment variant (the reading room). Both share the same tokens; only the surface assignment changes.
keyCharacteristics: Warm instrument density: information-rich layouts with tight spacing. Brass-and-wood control panel feel.
Bronze restraint with teal counterpoint: bronze is primary (≤10%), teal is secondary (≤5%). Warm/cool tension prevents monotony.
Tonal layering with texture: depth through warm-tinted surface steps and optional grain overlays, not drop shadows.
Dual-surface system: dark for working surfaces, parchment for reading surfaces. Same tokens, different assignments.
Monospace as authority: addresses, hashes, proofs use mono. Signals verifiable data.

rules.name: The 10% Rule
rules.body: Burnished Bronze appears on ≤10% of any given dark-mode screen. On light surfaces, up to 20%.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral has a bronze tint. The warmth is baked in, not added.

rules.name: The Teal Counterpoint Rule
rules.body: Oxidized Teal appears on ≤5% of any screen. Data visualizations, informational states, secondary links.

rules.name: The Dual-Surface Rule
rules.body: Working surfaces use dark palette. Reading surfaces use light palette. Same tokens, different assignments.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter carries all text. No display font, no body font pairing. Weight contrast creates hierarchy.

rules.name: The Mono Authority Rule
rules.body: Monospace signals 'this is verifiable data.' Never use mono for decorative effect or UI labels.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Sizes are rem-based, fixed. No clamp(), no fluid type. Users view product UI at consistent DPI.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only exception is the modal overlay.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: When one surface needs to sit above another, step up the warm-toned surface color, not add a shadow.

rules.name: The Optional Grain Rule
rules.body: Texture is a tool, not a requirement. Use on hero surfaces. Skip on data-dense dashboards.

dos: Use Burnished Bronze (#b8976e) as the primary accent. Its warmth against the tinted dark field is the brand's visual signature.
Keep bronze to ≤10% of any dark-mode screen. Rarity is the point.
Use Oxidized Teal (#5a8a8a) as a secondary accent for data visualization and informational states (≤5%).
Tint all neutrals toward bronze. The warmth is baked in, not added.
Use tonal layering (obsidian → dark-carbon → warm-iron) for depth instead of shadows.
Use the light surface (parchment, warm-cream) for reading contexts: onboarding, docs, marketing.
Use monospace for verifiable data: addresses, hashes, proofs, transaction IDs.
Maintain instrument density: multiple data points visible without scrolling.
Use the 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) transition for all state changes.
Pair semantic colors with text or icon. Color is never the only signal.
Add subtle grain/texture to hero surfaces and feature areas (2-4% opacity). Skip it on data-dense dashboards.
donts: Use neon gradients, rocket emojis, or meme-coin vibes. Axiom is infrastructure, not a casino.
Use cream/sand/beige backgrounds as default, rounded-32px cards, stock illustrations. Axiom is a tool, not a template.
Build TVL dashboards with 47 numbers or governance-speak. Show what matters for the agent you're looking at.
Use pure-black (#000) or pure-white (#fff) backgrounds. Every surface has a warm tint.
Use cold grays (#808080, #999999) without bronze tinting. They break the warm field.
Add shadows to cards, buttons, or inputs. The only shadow is the modal overlay.
Nest cards. A card inside a card is always wrong.
Use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradients).
Use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as colored accent).
Use border-radius ≥ 24px on cards or sections.
Pair a 1px border with a wide drop shadow (≥ 16px blur) on the same element.
Use display fonts in UI labels, buttons, or data.
Use teal for primary actions. That's bronze's job. Teal is informational.
Use all-caps body copy. Reserve uppercase for SectionTitle only.
